# Arcanum
Arcanum is the home base for LLM roleplay games — a directory of the best AI RPGs for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, honest reviews of roleplay platforms, and original downloadable game engines.

## Start here
- [The Complete Directory of LLM RPG Games](https://arcanumrpgs.com/blog/llm-rpg-games/): the canonical, continuously updated directory of LLM-native RPG games for ChatGPT (Custom GPTs), Claude (Projects), and Gemini (Gems) — how each is evaluated, the platform landscape, a model-by-model breakdown, and which to play first

## Main sections
- [Public Games](https://arcanumrpgs.com/games/): the best public AI RPGs, sorted by model and genre
- [Clients](https://arcanumrpgs.com/clients/): reviews of LLM roleplay platforms
- [Arcanum Originals](https://arcanumrpgs.com/arcanum-games/): our own downloadable game engines
- [The Codex](https://arcanumrpgs.com/blog/): guides, reviews, and articles on LLM roleplay
- [About](https://arcanumrpgs.com/about/): about Arcanum
